title: Just-In Blacksmith
description: A mod that lets you customize weapon stats,let's create your ultimate artifact.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95525dc8e022c257715415e9bb422b0e6bceb021_0.webp)

![smith stone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24aa4d7ff0a29b6dfcbb33250468200114aa4c0e.png)

A complete stat-forging system: Use the weapon smithing table to imbue your weapon with various attributes from smithing stones, carefully crafting your ideal weapon step by step. 

![smithing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59ef9a78ce4fb1e8498e9413ded40773919e87f9.png)
